name: @telorun/monorepo
description: Telo Runtime: A lightweight, polyglot execution host.
author: Bartosz Pasiński <bartosz.pasinski@codenet.pl>

scripts.test:docker: docker build -f cli/nodejs/Dockerfile -t telo:ci . && docker run --rm --user 1000 -v "$PWD":/srv -w /srv telo:ci ./test-suite.yaml
scripts.ci: pnpm run check modules/*/telo.yaml && pnpm run check examples/*.yaml && pnpm run check apps/*/telo.yaml && pnpm run check benchmarks/*/api.yaml && pnpm run check benchmarks/*/benchmark.yaml && pnpm run test && pnpm -r build && pnpm -r test && pnpm run test:node && pnpm run test:docker
